---
title: "Teaching"
title-block: false
---

# Teaching

::: {.page-intro}
I enjoy supporting rigorous training in microeconomics and contributing to methods-oriented instruction for students at different stages of study.
:::

## Teaching Assistantship

::: {.timeline-stack}
::: {.paper-entry}
### Microeconomics
<span class="paper-meta">Bocconi University | Undergraduate level | Teaching Assistant | 2024 and 2025</span>

Teaching support for core undergraduate microeconomics.
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### Microeconomics III
<span class="paper-meta">Bocconi University | PhD level | Teaching Assistant</span>

Teaching support for doctoral-level microeconomics training.
:::
:::

## Guest Lectures

::: {.timeline-stack}
::: {.paper-entry}
### Beyond Regression: Advanced Tools for Causal Inference
<span class="paper-meta">IGC Research Methodology Workshop | August 2025</span>

Guest lecture on advanced approaches to causal inference.
:::
:::
